steps.title: Identify the contextual signal
steps.content: The text says Lecuona's body of work showcases a diverse range of musical talents in different areas, from orchestral pieces and operas to popular film scores. The blank should describe this diversity.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
The blank needs to mean "continuing to have value" — Metzger still uses the data today. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — ongoing: continuing without end — fits perfectly, the value persists. ✓
  • Choice B — original: first or earliest — describes when the missions happened, not whether their value continues. ✗
  • Choice C — displaced: forced out or replaced — implies the value was removed, contradicting the passage. ✗
  • Choice D — controversial: disputed — no debate about the missions' worth is mentioned. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
